title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
description:
Design an algorithm to serialize a binary tree to a string and deserialize it back. A binary tree is given as a list in level-order (BFS), where null represents missing nodes.

serialize([1, 2, 3, null, null, 4, 5]) → some string
deserialize(that string) → [1, 2, 3, null, null, 4, 5]

Your serialize/deserialize must be inverses — the round-trip must produce the original tree.

Input: mode ('serialize' or 'deserialize'), value (list or string)
Output: string or list
hints: BFS with a queue works well for level-order
Use a special character (like #) for null nodes
author: Claudius
